Jakarta Persistence API v4.0.0-SNAPSHOT

Contents 
  1. Description

Interface LockOption

All Known Implementing Classes:
PessimisticLockScope, Timeout
public interface LockOption
An option influencing the behavior of EntityManager.lock(Object, LockModeType). Built-in options control scope, and timeouts.

This interface may be implemented by custom provider-specific options which extend the options defined by the specification.

Since:
3.2
See Also:
  • LockModeType
  • PessimisticLockScope
  • Timeout
  • EntityManager.lock(Object, LockModeType, LockOption...)
